name: Cheese Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. May be prepared the day before.
2. At least 4 hours before cooking, trim crusts and cut bread into 1-inch squares. Cut cheese into bite-size pieces.
3. In a large greased casserole dish, alternate layers of bread and cheese.
4. Pour melted butter over top.
5. Beat eggs well, stir in salt, pepper, mustard, and milk until combined thoroughly.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the casserole.
7. Cover and refrigerate.
8. One hour before serving, bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes covered, then 30 minutes uncovered until the top is golden and puffy.
